flowContents.comments: Ingests Account and Contact objects from Salesforce REST API into Snowflake via S3 staging
flowContents.name: Salesforce Ingestion

properties.SQL select query: UPDATE #{snowflake_database}.SALESFORCE.CONTACTS SET IS_DELETED=TRUE, _ETL_LOADED_AT=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() WHERE IS_DELETED=FALSE AND SF_ID NOT IN (SELECT _raw_json:Id::VARCHAR(18) FROM #{snowflake_database}.RAW.SF_CONTACTS_RAW WHERE _loaded_at >= DATEADD('hour', -2, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()))

UPDATE #{snowflake_database}.SALESFORCE.ACCOUNTS SET IS_DELETED=TRUE, _ETL_LOADED_AT=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() WHERE IS_DELETED=FALSE AND SF_ID NOT IN (SELECT _raw_json:Id::VARCHAR(18) FROM #{snowflake_database}.RAW.SF_ACCOUNTS_RAW WHERE _loaded_at >= DATEADD('hour', -2, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()))

MERGE INTO #{snowflake_database}.SALESFORCE.ACCOUNTS AS tgt USING (SELECT _raw_json:Id::VARCHAR(18) AS SF_ID, _raw_json:Name::VARCHAR(255) AS NAME, _raw_json:Industry::VARCHAR(100) AS INDUSTRY, _raw_json:AnnualRevenue::NUMBER(18,2) AS ANNUAL_REVENUE, _raw_json:BillingCity::VARCHAR(100) AS BILLING_CITY, _raw_json:BillingCountry::VARCHAR(100) AS BILLING_COUNTRY, _raw_json:Phone::VARCHAR(40) AS PHONE, _raw_json:Website::VARCHAR(255) AS WEBSITE, _raw_json:NumberOfEmployees::INTEGER AS NUMBER_OF_EMPLOYEES, _raw_json:OwnerId::VARCHAR(18) AS OWNER_ID, _raw_json:CreatedDate::TIMESTAMP_NTZ AS CREATED_DATE, _raw_json:LastModifiedDate::TIMESTAMP_NTZ AS LAST_MODIFIED_DATE, _batch_id FROM #{snowflake_database}.RAW.SF_ACCOUNTS_RAW QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY _raw_json:Id::VARCHAR ORDER BY _LOADED_AT DESC) = 1) AS src ON tgt.SF_ID = src.SF_ID WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET tgt.NAME=src.NAME, tgt.INDUSTRY=src.INDUSTRY, tgt.ANNUAL_REVENUE=src.ANNUAL_REVENUE, tgt.BILLING_CITY=src.BILLING_CITY, tgt.BILLING_COUNTRY=src.BILLING_COUNTRY, tgt.PHONE=src.PHONE, tgt.WEBSITE=src.WEBSITE, tgt.NUMBER_OF_EMPLOYEES=src.NUMBER_OF_EMPLOYEES, tgt.OWNER_ID=src.OWNER_ID, tgt.LAST_MODIFIED_DATE=src.LAST_MODIFIED_DATE, tgt.IS_DELETED=FALSE, tgt._ETL_LOADED_AT=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), tgt._ETL_BATCH_ID=src._BATCH_ID WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (SF_ID,NAME,INDUSTRY,ANNUAL_REVENUE,BILLING_CITY,BILLING_COUNTRY,PHONE,WEBSITE,NUMBER_OF_EMPLOYEES,OWNER_ID,CREATED_DATE,LAST_MODIFIED_DATE,IS_DELETED,_ETL_LOADED_AT,_ETL_BATCH_ID) VALUES (src.SF_ID,src.NAME,src.INDUSTRY,src.ANNUAL_REVENUE,src.BILLING_CITY,src.BILLING_COUNTRY,src.PHONE,src.WEBSITE,src.NUMBER_OF_EMPLOYEES,src.OWNER_ID,src.CREATED_DATE,src.LAST_MODIFIED_DATE,FALSE,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(),src._BATCH_ID)

MERGE INTO #{snowflake_database}.SALESFORCE.CONTACTS AS tgt USING (SELECT _raw_json:Id::VARCHAR(18) AS SF_ID, _raw_json:AccountId::VARCHAR(18) AS ACCOUNT_ID, _raw_json:FirstName::VARCHAR(40) AS FIRST_NAME, _raw_json:LastName::VARCHAR(80) AS LAST_NAME, _raw_json:Email::VARCHAR(80) AS EMAIL, _raw_json:Phone::VARCHAR(40) AS PHONE, _raw_json:Title::VARCHAR(128) AS TITLE, _raw_json:Department::VARCHAR(80) AS DEPARTMENT, _raw_json:LeadSource::VARCHAR(40) AS LEAD_SOURCE, _raw_json:OwnerId::VARCHAR(18) AS OWNER_ID, _raw_json:CreatedDate::TIMESTAMP_NTZ AS CREATED_DATE, _raw_json:LastModifiedDate::TIMESTAMP_NTZ AS LAST_MODIFIED_DATE, _batch_id FROM #{snowflake_database}.RAW.SF_CONTACTS_RAW QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY _raw_json:Id::VARCHAR ORDER BY _LOADED_AT DESC) = 1) AS src ON tgt.SF_ID = src.SF_ID WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET tgt.ACCOUNT_ID=src.ACCOUNT_ID, tgt.FIRST_NAME=src.FIRST_NAME, tgt.LAST_NAME=src.LAST_NAME, tgt.EMAIL=src.EMAIL, tgt.PHONE=src.PHONE, tgt.TITLE=src.TITLE, tgt.DEPARTMENT=src.DEPARTMENT, tgt.LEAD_SOURCE=src.LEAD_SOURCE, tgt.OWNER_ID=src.OWNER_ID, tgt.LAST_MODIFIED_DATE=src.LAST_MODIFIED_DATE, tgt.IS_DELETED=FALSE, tgt._ETL_LOADED_AT=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), tgt._ETL_BATCH_ID=src._BATCH_ID WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (SF_ID,ACCOUNT_ID,FIRST_NAME,LAST_NAME,EMAIL,PHONE,TITLE,DEPARTMENT,LEAD_SOURCE,OWNER_ID,CREATED_DATE,LAST_MODIFIED_DATE,IS_DELETED,_ETL_LOADED_AT,_ETL_BATCH_ID) VALUES (src.SF_ID,src.ACCOUNT_ID,src.FIRST_NAME,src.LAST_NAME,src.EMAIL,src.PHONE,src.TITLE,src.DEPARTMENT,src.LEAD_SOURCE,src.OWNER_ID,src.CREATED_DATE,src.LAST_MODIFIED_DATE,FALSE,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(),src._BATCH_ID)

COPY INTO #{snowflake_database}.RAW.SF_ACCOUNTS_RAW (_raw_json, _source_file, _batch_id) FROM (SELECT $1, METADATA$FILENAME, '${s3.key}' FROM @#{snowflake_database}.RAW.OPENFLOW_S3_STAGE/staged/salesforce/accounts/) FILE_FORMAT=(TYPE=JSON STRIP_OUTER_ARRAY=TRUE) ON_ERROR='CONTINUE' PURGE=FALSE

COPY INTO #{snowflake_database}.RAW.SF_CONTACTS_RAW (_raw_json, _source_file, _batch_id) FROM (SELECT $1, METADATA$FILENAME, '${s3.key}' FROM @#{snowflake_database}.RAW.OPENFLOW_S3_STAGE/staged/salesforce/contacts/) FILE_FORMAT=(TYPE=JSON STRIP_OUTER_ARRAY=TRUE) ON_ERROR='CONTINUE' PURGE=FALSE

snapshotMetadata.author: anonymous
snapshotMetadata.comments: Add MERGE + soft-delete processors: RAW → SALESFORCE.ACCOUNTS/CONTACTS
